shot.composition: sparrow POV, ultra-tight fisheye, strong forward parallax
shot.camera_movement: single take, fast glide, snap turns, low passes, sharp climb, soft landing

subject.description: sparrow flying fast through a busy Indian cafe terrace at bird scale
subject.props: tables, chairs, cups, plates, umbrellas, human legs, crumbs

scene.environment: warm light, moving people, air currents, reflective glasses

visual_details.action: sparrow dives under umbrella, skims cups, threads chair legs, blasts past hands, circles table, lands on croissant
visual_details.special_effects: speed blur, near-miss distortion, reflective streaks, soft macro settle
visual_details.hair_clothing_motion: feathers whipping hard then calming on landing

cinematography.lighting: warm sun with soft bounce and glass highlights
cinematography.color_palette: wood brown, cream white, golden pastry, city gray

audio.ambient: wing rush, cafe murmur, light wind
audio.sound_effects: cup clinks, chair whoosh, plate skim, soft landing
audio.mix_level: wing and near-miss details dominant, intimate ending

negative_prompt: shaky camera, low framerate, flickering, distorted faces, text, watermarks
